```{r}
plotCounts(GC.dds.6, gene="GC_00000165", intgroup="plant_clade")
```

### Plot
Long plot with all DAGs
```{r}
gg_heat <- ggplot(abundances.GC, aes(x = sample, y = gene_cluster_id)) + 
  geom_tile(aes(fill=abund)) + 
# geom_tile(aes(fill=sqrt(abund))) + # heat transformed to square root coverage value
  scale_fill_viridis(name = "Normalized\nabundance", option="magma", direction = -1
                    ,trans = "log"
                    ,breaks = c(2,5,12,25,50,100,200,400,800)
                    ) +
#  scale_fill_gradient(high= "darkblue", low = "yellow", name = "Coverage (rarefied)"
#                      ,trans = "sqrt"
#                      ) + 
  theme(legend.position="none") +
  scale_y_discrete(limits=rev) +
  labs(x = "Sample") +
    theme_bw() +
      theme(
      text = element_text(family = "Arial"),
      legend.justification = c(0.25, 0),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 6, margin = margin(b = 7.5)),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 6),
      legend.key.size = unit(0.45, "cm"),
      legend.spacing.y = unit(0.25, "cm"),
      legend.position = "right", 
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
      panel.background = element_blank(),
      #panel.grid.minor = element_line(color = "lightgray", size = 0.25), 
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
      axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 6, angle = 90, vjust = 0.35, hjust = 1),
      axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 6),
      axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 6.5, angle = 0, hjust = 0.5, vjust = -1, face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 6.5, angle = 90, hjust = 0.5, vjust = 2, face = "bold")
      ) + coord_fixed(ratio = 1)
#gg_heat

gg_comp <- ggplot(compare.GC, aes(x = host, y = gene_cluster_id)) + 
  geom_tile(aes(fill=factor(compare))) + 
# geom_tile(aes(fill=sqrt(abund))) + # heat transformed to square root coverage value
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("3" = "red", "2" = "white", "1" = "blue"), name = "Comparisons", labels = c("Comparison", "Unconsidered", "Reference")) + 
  theme(legend.position="none") +
  scale_y_discrete(limits=rev) +
  labs(x = "Host") +
    theme_bw() +
      theme(
      text = element_text(family = "Arial"),
      legend.justification = c(0.25, 0),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 6, margin = margin(b = 7.5)),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 6),
      legend.key.size = unit(0.45, "cm"),
      legend.spacing.y = unit(0.25, "cm"),
      legend.position = "right", 
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
      panel.background = element_blank(),
      #panel.grid.minor = element_line(color = "lightgray", size = 0.25), 
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
      axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 6, angle = 90, vjust = 0.35, hjust = 1),
      axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 6),
      axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 6.5, angle = 0, hjust = 0.5, vjust = -1, face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 6.5, angle = 90, hjust = 0.5, vjust = 2, face = "bold")
      ) + coord_fixed(ratio = 1)
#gg_comp

gg_point <- ggplot(DAGs.L2FC, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = gene_cluster_id)) + 
  geom_point(size = 1.25) + 
  theme(legend.position="none") +
  scale_y_discrete(limits=rev) +
  labs(x = "log2 Fold Change") +
    theme_bw() +
      theme(
      text = element_text(family = "Arial"),
      legend.justification = c(0.25, 0),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 6, margin = margin(b = 7.5)),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 6),
      legend.key.size = unit(0.45, "cm"),
      legend.spacing.y = unit(0.25, "cm"),
      legend.position = "right", 
      panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "gray", size = 0.125), 
      panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
      panel.background = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), 
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
      axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 6, angle = 0, vjust = 0.35, hjust = 0.5),
      axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 6),
      axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 6.5, angle = 0, hjust = 0.5, vjust = -1, face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 6.5, angle = 90, hjust = 0.5, vjust = 2, face = "bold")
      )
#gg_point

gg_acc.core <- ggplot(DAGs.Acc.Core, aes(x = 1, y = gene_cluster_id, fill = type)) +
  geom_tile() + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("core" = "forestgreen", "accessory" = "yellow"), name = "Type", labels = c("Core", "Accessory")) + 
  scale_y_discrete(limits=rev) +
  labs(x = "Type") +
    theme_bw() +
      theme(
      text = element_text(family = "Arial"),
      legend.justification = c(0.25, 0),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 6, margin = margin(b = 7.5)),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 6),
      legend.key.size = unit(0.45, "cm"),
      legend.spacing.y = unit(0.25, "cm"),
      legend.position = "right", 
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
      panel.background = element_blank(),
      #panel.grid.minor = element_line(color = "lightgray", size = 0.25), 
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
      axis.text.x = element_blank(),
      axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 6),
      axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 6, angle = 0, hjust = 0.5, vjust = -1, face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 7.5, angle = 90, hjust = 0.5, vjust = 2, face = "bold")
      ) + coord_fixed(ratio = 1)
#gg_acc.core


# GC order is the same for both heatmap.

# Remove GC names on gg_comp figure.
#gg_comp <- gg_comp +
#    theme(
#      axis.text.y = element_blank(),
#      axis.title.y = element_blank(),
#      axis.ticks.y = element_blank()
#      )

# Remove GC names on gg_heat and gg_point figures.
gg_heat <- gg_heat +
    theme(
      axis.text.y = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.y = element_blank()
      )

gg_point <- gg_point +
    theme(
      axis.text.y = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.y = element_blank()
      )

gg_acc.core <- gg_acc.core +
    theme(
      axis.text.y = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.x = element_blank()
      )

((gg_comp + gg_heat) + (gg_acc.core + gg_point))

ggsave("../figures/DAGs_heatmap_v5-2-241115.tiff", width = 8, height = 80, limitsize = FALSE)

gg_fct <- ggplot(DAGs.functions.all.info, aes(x = 1, y = GC.function, label = GC.function)) + 
  geom_text(hjust = 0) + 
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 2), breaks = NULL) + 
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev(unique(DAGs.functions.all.info$GC.function))) +  
  theme_void() +  
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 6, hjust = 0),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),  
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),  
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),  
    axis.title.y = element_blank() 
  )

gg_fct

ggsave("../figures/DAGs_functions.tiff", width = 8, height = 80, limitsize = FALSE)


```

## Plot volcanos

### Import data
```{r}
volc.TS.data.fct <- readRDS("../rds/volc.TS.data.fct.rds")
volc.AG.data.fct <- readRDS("../rds/volc.AG.data.fct.rds")
GC.rar.fct.cov <- readRDS("../rds/GC.rar.fct.cov.rds")
```

### Prepare TS and AG data
```{r}
# TS

GC.rar.fct.cov.SUB <- GC.rar.fct.cov[,c(1,42:64)]
GC.rar.fct.cov.SUB <- unique(GC.rar.fct.cov.SUB)

volc.TS.data.fct <- merge(volc.TS.data.fct, GC.rar.fct.cov.SUB, by = "gene_cluster_id")
volc.TS.data.fct <- volc.TS.data.fct[order(-volc.TS.data.fct$log2FoldChange), ]
volc.TS.data.fct$COG20_FUNCTION <- as.factor(volc.TS.data.fct$COG20_FUNCTION)

# AG

volc.AG.data.fct <- merge(volc.AG.data.fct, GC.rar.fct.cov.SUB, by = "gene_cluster_id")
volc.AG.data.fct <- volc.AG.data.fct[order(-volc.AG.data.fct$log2FoldChange), ]
volc.AG.data.fct$COG20_FUNCTION <- as.factor(volc.AG.data.fct$COG20_FUNCTION)
```

Add COG Categories
```{r}
# Prep
cog.cat.fct <- readRDS("../rds/data.fct.cov.rds")
cog.cat.fct <- cog.cat.fct[,c(1,6,11)]
cog.cat.fct <- cog.cat.fct %>%
  distinct(COG20_FUNCTION, .keep_all = TRUE)

# TS
volc.TS.data.fct <- merge(volc.TS.data.fct, cog.cat.fct[, c("COG20_FUNCTION", "COG20_CATEGORY_ACC")], by = "COG20_FUNCTION", all.x = TRUE)
volc.TS.data.fct <- volc.TS.data.fct[,c(2:15,41,1,16:40)]

# Manually add double categories
volc.TS.data.fct$COG20_CATEGORY_ACC <- factor(volc.TS.data.fct$COG20_CATEGORY_ACC, levels = c("J","A","K","L","B","D","Y","V","T","M","N","Z","W","U","O","X","X|X","X|V","C","C|P","G","E","E|H","F","H","I","P","Q","Q|Q","R","S"))
volc.TS.data.fct$COG20_CATEGORY_ACC <- droplevels(volc.TS.data.fct$COG20_CATEGORY_ACC)
volc.TS.data.fct <- volc.TS.data.fct[order(volc.TS.data.fct$COG20_CATEGORY_ACC, -volc.TS.data.fct$log2FoldChange), ]

# AG 
volc.AG.data.fct <- merge(volc.AG.data.fct, cog.cat.fct[, c("COG20_FUNCTION", "COG20_CATEGORY_ACC")], by = "COG20_FUNCTION", all.x = TRUE)
volc.AG.data.fct <- volc.AG.data.fct[,c(2:15,41,1,16:40)]

# Manually add double categories
volc.AG.data.fct$COG20_CATEGORY_ACC <- factor(volc.AG.data.fct$COG20_CATEGORY_ACC, levels = c("J","A","K","K|V","K|G","L","B","D","Y","V","T","T|T","P|T","M","D|M","N","N|W","Z","W","U","U|W","O","X","X|X","X|V","C","C|P","G","E","E|H","F","H","H|R","I","I|S","P","Q","Q|Q","R","S|R","S"))
volc.AG.data.fct$COG20_CATEGORY_ACC <- droplevels(volc.AG.data.fct$COG20_CATEGORY_ACC)
volc.AG.data.fct <- volc.AG.data.fct[order(volc.AG.data.fct$COG20_CATEGORY_ACC, -volc.AG.data.fct$log2FoldChange), ]
```



### Prepare data for heatmap TS TREES-SHRUB
```{r}
volc.TS.heat.data <- volc.TS.data.fct

# Pre-Edit GC.function names
volc.TS.heat.data$GC.function <- gsub("\\(PDB.*?\\)", "", as.character(volc.TS.heat.data$GC.function))
volc.TS.heat.data$GC.function <- gsub("\\(PUBMED.*?\\)", "", as.character(volc.TS.heat.data$GC.function))
volc.TS.heat.data$GC.function <- gsub("\\[EC.*?\\]", "", as.character(volc.TS.heat.data$GC.function))
volc.TS.heat.data$GC.function <- gsub("\\s*\\|", "|", as.character(volc.TS.heat.data$GC.function))
volc.TS.heat.data$GC.function <- paste(volc.TS.heat.data$gene_cluster_id, volc.TS.heat.data$GC.function, sep = ": ")
volc.TS.heat.data$GC.function <- as.factor(volc.TS.heat.data$GC.function)

# Manually edit name on excel.
#write_csv(volc.TS.heat.data, file = "../volc.TS.heat.data_v5.3.csv")
# import
volc.TS.heat.data <- as.data.frame(read_delim("../volc.TS.heat.data_edit_v5.3.csv"))

volc.TS.heat.data$GC.function <- trimws(volc.TS.heat.data$GC.function)
volc.TS.heat.data$GC.function <- as.factor(volc.TS.heat.data$GC.function)
rownames(volc.TS.heat.data) <- volc.TS.heat.data$GC.function
volc.TS.heat.data <- volc.TS.heat.data[,c(19:41)]
volc.TS.heat.data.t <- data.frame(t(volc.TS.heat.data))
colnames(volc.TS.heat.data.t) <- rownames(volc.TS.heat.data)
volc.TS.heat.data <- volc.TS.heat.data.t
volc.TS.heat.data <- picante::matrix2sample(volc.TS.heat.data)
colnames(volc.TS.heat.data) <- c("sample","abund","GC.function")
volc.TS.heat.data$sample <- factor(x = volc.TS.heat.data$sample, levels = c("ABBA_M11","ABBA_M12","ABBA_M13","ABBA_M14","ABBA_M15","THOC_M06","THOC_M07","THOC_M08","THOC_M09","THOC_M10","ACSA_M21","ACSA_M22","ACSA_M24","ACSA_M25","FAGR_M16","FAGR_M17","FAGR_M19","FAGR_M20","COCO_M01","COCO_M02","COCO_M03","COCO_M04","COCO_M05"))
```

### Plot TS TREES-SHRUB
```{r}
# Abundance heatmap

gg_heat_TS <- ggplot(volc.TS.heat.data, aes(x = GC.function, y = sample)) + 
  geom_tile(aes(fill=abund)) + 
# geom_tile(aes(fill=sqrt(abund))) + # heat transformed to square root coverage value
  scale_fill_viridis(name = "Normalized\nabundance", option="magma", direction = -1
                    ,trans = "log"
                    ,breaks = c(2,5,12,25,50,100,200,400,800)
                    ) +
#  scale_fill_gradient(high= "darkblue", low = "yellow", name = "Coverage (rarefied)"
#                      ,trans = "sqrt"
#                      ) + 
  theme(legend.position="none") +
  scale_y_discrete(limits=rev) +
  labs(x = "Gene clusters & functions", y = "Samples") +
    theme_bw() +
      theme(
      text = element_text(family = "Arial"),
      legend.justification = c(0.5, 0),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 12, margin = margin(b = 7.5)),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
      legend.key.size = unit(0.9, "cm"),
      legend.spacing.y = unit(0.5, "cm"),
      legend.position = "left", 
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
      panel.background = element_blank(),
      #panel.grid.minor = element_line(color = "lightgray", size = 0.25), 
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
      axis.text.x.bottom = element_text(vjust = 1),
      axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 10, angle = 70, hjust = 1),
      axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
      axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 13, angle = 0, hjust = 0.5, vjust = -1, face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 13, angle = 90, hjust = 0.5, vjust = 2, face = "bold")
      ) + coord_fixed(ratio = 1)
gg_heat_TS
ggsave("../figures/volcano_DAGCs_heat_TS_v5.3.tiff", width = 8, height = 11, limitsize = FALSE)


# Log2FC 

# Prep
volc.TS.data.fct$gene_cluster_id <- factor(x = volc.TS.data.fct$gene_cluster_id, levels = unique(volc.TS.data.fct$gene_cluster_id))
levels(volc.TS.data.fct$gene_cluster_id)
volc.TS.data.fct$type <- factor(x = volc.TS.data.fct$type, levels = c("core","accessory"))


gg_point_TS <- ggplot(volc.TS.data.fct, aes(x = gene_cluster_id, y = log2FoldChange, fill = type)) + 
  geom_col(width = 0.9) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("core" = "skyblue", "accessory" ="black")) +
  theme(legend.position="none") +
  labs(y = "log(2)FC") +
    theme_bw() +
      theme(
      text = element_text(family = "Arial"),
      legend.position = "none", 
      panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90", size = 0.25), 
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(), 
      panel.background = element_blank(),
      #panel.grid.minor = element_line(color = "lightgray", size = 0.25), 
      plot.title = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
      axis.text.x = element_blank(),
      axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 13, angle = 90, hjust = 0.5, vjust = 2, face = "bold")
      )
gg_point_TS
ggsave("../figures/volcano_DAGCs_l2fc_TS.tiff", width = 5.85, height = 1, limitsize = FALSE)
```


### Prepare data for heatmap AG ANGIO-GYMNO
```{r}
volc.AG.heat.data <- volc.AG.data.fct

# Pre-Edit GC.function names
volc.AG.heat.data$GC.function <- gsub("\\(PDB.*?\\)", "", as.character(volc.AG.heat.data$GC.function))
volc.AG.heat.data$GC.function <- gsub("\\(PUBMED.*?\\)", "", as.character(volc.AG.heat.data$GC.function))
volc.AG.heat.data$GC.function <- gsub("\\[EC.*?\\]", "", as.character(volc.AG.heat.data$GC.function))
volc.AG.heat.data$GC.function <- gsub("\\s*\\|", "|", as.character(volc.AG.heat.data$GC.function))
volc.AG.heat.data$GC.function <- paste(volc.AG.heat.data$gene_cluster_id, volc.AG.heat.data$GC.function, sep = ": ")
volc.AG.heat.data$GC.function <- as.factor(volc.AG.heat.data$GC.function)

# Manually edit name on excel.
#write_csv(volc.AG.heat.data, file = "../volc.AG.heat.data_v5.3.csv")

volc.AG.heat.data <- as.data.frame(read_delim("../volc.AG.heat.data_edit_v5.3.csv"))

volc.AG.heat.data$GC.function <- as.factor(volc.AG.heat.data$GC.function)

colnames(volc.AG.heat.data.t) <- rownames(volc.AG.heat.data)
volc.AG.heat.data <- volc.AG.heat.data.t

volc.AG.heat.data$sample <- factor(x = volc.AG.heat.data$sample, levels = c("ABBA_M11","ABBA_M12","ABBA_M13","ABBA_M14","ABBA_M15","THOC_M06","THOC_M07","THOC_M08","THOC_M09","THOC_M10","ACSA_M21","ACSA_M22","ACSA_M24","ACSA_M25","FAGR_M16","FAGR_M17","FAGR_M19","FAGR_M20","COCO_M01","COCO_M02","COCO_M03","COCO_M04","COCO_M05"))
```

Note 251125: This section above code (11 chunks) leads to the first version of the DAGCs table (which does not contain COG category and pathways, nor KEGG brite, class and modules), as well as to creation of the long DAGCs figures, and volcano plots. To create latest version of the DAGCs table, see script 'DAGCs_analyses_followup.Rmd'.



################################################################################

# OLD CODE

Note 251127: This section below leads to the first version of the COG categories figure (M.Sc.)


## Plot COGs

Relative abundances of COG categories within every comparison.
Abondance relative des catégories COG au sein de chaque comparaison.

### Prepare data
```{r}
# Preparation comparison types ('comp' vector)
DAGs.bind <- readRDS("../rds/DAGs.bind.rds")
DAGs.COG.CAT <- DAGs.bind[,c(1,7,69:73)]
DAGs.COG.CAT[,c(3:7)] <- DAGs.COG.CAT[,c(3:7)] + 2  # Transform '-1' to '1'; '0' to '2'; and '1' to '3'
DAGs.COG.CAT$comp <- apply(DAGs.COG.CAT[,c(3:7)], 1, function(x) {
  paste(x, collapse = "")  # Combine values into a single string
})
DAGs.COG.CAT$comp <- as.factor(DAGs.COG.CAT$comp)

# Change empty values (COG20 Categories) for "No annotation"
DAGs.COG.CAT$COG20_CATEGORY <- factor(ifelse(DAGs.COG.CAT$COG20_CATEGORY == "", "No annotation", as.character(DAGs.COG.CAT$COG20_CATEGORY)))

# For every gene call that have multiple (n) COG categories, make n rows, one row per category.
DAGs.COG.CAT.temp <- DAGs.COG.CAT
DAGs.COG.CAT.temp$COG20_CATEGORY <- as.character(DAGs.COG.CAT.temp$COG20_CATEGORY)
# Add row number column
df_split1 <- DAGs.COG.CAT.temp %>%
  rowid_to_column()  # Add a column representing the original row number
# Split rows based on "|" and unnest
df_split2 <- df_split1 %>%
  mutate(COG20_CATEGORY = strsplit(COG20_CATEGORY, "\\|")) %>%
  unnest(cols = COG20_CATEGORY)
# Remove duplicates within rows
df_split3 <- df_split2 %>%
  distinct(gene_cluster_id, COG20_CATEGORY, .keep_all = TRUE)  # Keep the first occurrence of each gene_cluster_id-COG20_CATEGORY combination
# Remove rowid column
df_split4 <- df_split3 %>%
  select(-rowid)
DAGs.COG.CAT.multi <- as.data.frame(df_split4)
rm(DAGs.COG.CAT.temp, df_split1, df_split2, df_split3, df_split4)
# arrange vectors in df
DAGs.COG.CAT.multi$COG20_CATEGORY <- as.factor(DAGs.COG.CAT.multi$COG20_CATEGORY)
DAGs.COG.CAT.multi$comp <- factor(DAGs.COG.CAT.multi$comp, levels = unique(DAGs.COG.CAT.multi$comp))

# Count each COG categories (COG.CAT) counts for each comparison type
DAGs.COG.CAT.counts = DAGs.COG.CAT.multi %>% 
  group_by(comp, COG20_CATEGORY) %>% 
  summarise(COG.CAT.counts.per.comp=n())

# Calculate total COG categories counts (COG.CAT.counts) per comparison type (total.COG.counts.per.comp)
comp.counts.ORIG <- DAGs.COG.CAT.counts %>%
  group_by(comp) %>%
  summarise(total.COG.counts.per.comp = sum(COG.CAT.counts.per.comp))
#### RESULTS ####
# I CAN USE 'comp.counts.ORIG' TO KNOW HOW MANY COUNTS FOR EACH COMPARISONS BEFORE REMOVING "No annotation" and "Function unknown" (NOTE: it is not how many DAGs for each comparison, because some DAGs have multiple categories assigned to).

# Calculate total COG categories counts (COG.CAT.counts) across comparisons type
COG.c.ORIG <- DAGs.COG.CAT.counts %>%
  group_by(COG20_CATEGORY) %>%
  summarise(COG.c = sum(COG.CAT.counts.per.comp)) %>% 
  ungroup()
#### RESULT ####
# I CAN USE 'COG.c.ORIG' TO KNOW HOW MANY COUNTS FOR EACH COG CATEGORIES INCLUDING "No annotation" and "Function unknown" across comparison types
# THERE IS 605 COUNTS OF "NO ANNOTATION" AND 49 COUNTS OF "FUNCTION UNKNOWN"

# Remove "No annotation" and "Function unknown"
DAGs.COG.CAT.counts <- subset(DAGs.COG.CAT.counts, !(COG20_CATEGORY %in% c("No annotation", "Function unknown")))

# Re-calculate total counts (COG.CAT.counts) per comparison type (total.COG.counts.per.comp) without "function unknown" nor "no annotation" 
comp.counts <- DAGs.COG.CAT.counts %>%
  group_by(comp) %>%
  summarise(total.COG.counts.per.comp = sum(COG.CAT.counts.per.comp))

DAGs.COG.CAT.counts <- merge(DAGs.COG.CAT.counts, comp.counts, by = "comp")
DAGs.COG.CAT.counts <- DAGs.COG.CAT.counts %>%
  arrange(comp)

# calculate relative abundance of each COG categories within comparison type
DAGs.COG.CAT.counts$rel.abund.COG.CAT.in.comp <- DAGs.COG.CAT.counts$COG.CAT.counts.per.comp/DAGs.COG.CAT.counts$total.COG.counts.per.comp

# Verify data 
sum(DAGs.COG.CAT.counts[DAGs.COG.CAT.counts$comp == "33331",]$rel.abund.COG.CAT.in.comp) # should sum to 1
sum(DAGs.COG.CAT.counts$rel.abund.COG.CAT.in.comp) # should sum to the number of comparison types (11)


# DO NOT RUN BELOW HERE. NOT NEEDED. KEPT AS BACKUP.

# Calculate relative abundance of categories across comparisons type (based on normalized COG.CAT counts)
#total.norm.COG.CAT.counts.across.comp <- DAGs.COG.CAT.counts %>%
#  group_by(COG20_CATEGORY) %>%
#  summarise(total.norm.COG.CAT.counts.across.comp = sum(norm.COG.CAT.counts.per.comp)) %>% 
#  ungroup()

#DAGs.COG.CAT.prop <- merge(DAGs.COG.CAT.counts, total.norm.COG.CAT.counts.across.comp, by = "COG20_CATEGORY")
#DAGs.COG.CAT.prop <- DAGs.COG.CAT.prop %>%
#  arrange(comp)

#DAGs.COG.CAT.prop$norm.rel.abund <- DAGs.COG.CAT.prop$norm.COG.CAT.counts.per.comp/DAGs.COG.CAT.prop$total.norm.COG.CAT.counts.across.comp

# test if it worked
#sum(DAGs.COG.CAT.prop[DAGs.COG.CAT.prop$COG20_CATEGORY == "Carbohydrate transport and metabolism",]$norm.rel.abund) # should sum to 1
#sum(DAGs.COG.CAT.prop$norm.COG.CAT.counts.per.comp) # should sum to the number of comparison types (7 in v5)
```


Prepare data for COG (calculate number of counts for each COG categories across comparison types)
```{r}
COG.c <- DAGs.COG.CAT.counts %>%
  group_by(COG20_CATEGORY) %>%
  summarise(COG.c = sum(COG.CAT.counts.per.comp)) %>% 
  ungroup()
```

Prepare data for comp (calculate number of COG counts for each comparison types across COG categories)
```{r}
# THIS IS NOT DAGs COUNTS!!!
# with "Function unknown" and "No annotation"
comp.counts.ORIG
# without "Function unknown" and "No annotation"
comp.c <- DAGs.COG.CAT.counts %>%
  distinct(comp, .keep_all = TRUE) 
comp.c <- comp.c[,c(1,4)]
comp.c$comp <- droplevels(comp.c$comp)
```

Prepare data for DAGs counts per comp
```{r}
DAGs.c <- DAGs.COG.CAT %>%
  distinct(gene_cluster_id, comp, .keep_all = F)

DAGs.c <- DAGs.c %>%
  group_by(comp) %>%
  summarise(DAGs.c = n_distinct(gene_cluster_id))
DAGs.c$comp <- factor(DAGs.c$comp, levels = levels(comp.c$comp))
DAGs.c <- DAGs.c[order(DAGs.c$comp), ]
```


Sorting dataframes in decreasing amount of total COG counts (so that in plot, COG category with the highest amount of counts across comparison types will be at the top of y axis)
```{r}
COG.c <- COG.c[order(-COG.c$COG.c), ]
COG.c$COG20_CATEGORY <- factor(COG.c$COG20_CATEGORY, levels = unique(COG.c$COG20_CATEGORY))
levels(COG.c$COG20_CATEGORY)
DAGs.COG.CAT.counts$COG20_CATEGORY <- factor(DAGs.COG.CAT.counts$COG20_CATEGORY, levels = levels(factor(COG.c$COG20_CATEGORY)))
all(levels(DAGs.COG.CAT.counts$COG20_CATEGORY)==levels(COG.c$COG20_CATEGORY))
```

### Complementary Plots for COGs

### Prepare data
```{r}
comparisons <- unique(DAGs.COG.CAT[,c(3:8)])
comparisons <- comparisons[comparisons$comp %in% levels(comp.c$comp),]
rownames(comparisons) <- comparisons$comp
comparisons <- comparisons[,-6]
comparisons <- as.data.frame(t(comparisons))
comparisons <- picante::matrix2sample(comparisons)
colnames(comparisons) <- c("host","compare","comp_id")
comparisons$host <- factor(x = comparisons$host, levels = c("ABBA","THOC","ACSA","FAGR","COCO"))
comparisons$compare <- factor(x = comparisons$compare, levels = c("3","2","1"))
```

  ###### DO NOT RUN BELOW THIS IS JUST A TEST ######

Prepare data (take 1)
```{r}
# Preparation
DAGs.COG.CAT <- DAGs.bind[,c(1,6,61:65)]
DAGs.COG.CAT[,c(3:7)] <- DAGs.COG.CAT[,c(3:7)] + 2

DAGs.COG.CAT$comp <- apply(DAGs.COG.CAT[,c(3:7)], 1, function(x) {
  paste(x, collapse = "")  # Combine values into a single string
})

DAGs.COG.CAT$comp <- as.factor(DAGs.COG.CAT$comp)

# Change empty values for "No annotation"
DAGs.COG.CAT$COG20_CATEGORY <- factor(ifelse(DAGs.COG.CAT$COG20_CATEGORY == "", "No annotation", as.character(DAGs.COG.CAT$COG20_CATEGORY)))
  
# For every gene call that have multiple (n) COG categories, make n rows, one row per category.
DAGs.COG.CAT.temp <- DAGs.COG.CAT
DAGs.COG.CAT.temp$COG20_CATEGORY <- as.character(DAGs.COG.CAT.temp$COG20_CATEGORY)

# Add row number column
df_split1 <- DAGs.COG.CAT.temp %>%
  rowid_to_column()  # Add a column representing the original row number

# Split rows based on "|" and unnest
df_split2 <- df_split1 %>%
  mutate(COG20_CATEGORY = strsplit(COG20_CATEGORY, "\\|")) %>%
  unnest(cols = COG20_CATEGORY)

# Remove duplicates within rows
df_split3 <- df_split2 %>%
  distinct(gene_cluster_id, COG20_CATEGORY, .keep_all = TRUE)  # Keep the first occurrence of each gene_cluster_id-COG20_CATEGORY combination

# Remove rowid column
df_split4 <- df_split3 %>%
  select(-rowid)

DAGs.COG.CAT.multi <- as.data.frame(df_split4)
DAGs.COG.CAT.multi$COG20_CATEGORY <- as.factor(DAGs.COG.CAT.multi$COG20_CATEGORY)
DAGs.COG.CAT.multi$comp <- factor(DAGs.COG.CAT.multi$comp, levels = unique(DAGs.COG.CAT.multi$comp))

rm(DAGs.COG.CAT.temp, df_split1, df_split2, df_split3, df_split4)

# Count each COG categories counts at each comparison type
DAGs.COG.CAT.counts = DAGs.COG.CAT.multi %>% 
  group_by(comp, COG20_CATEGORY) %>% 
  summarise(COG.counts=n())

# Calculate relative abundance of categories across comparisons type
DAGs.COG.CAT.prop <- DAGs.COG.CAT.counts %>%
  group_by(COG20_CATEGORY) %>%
  summarise(total_CAT.count = sum(COG.counts)) %>% 
  ungroup()

DAGs.COG.CAT.prop <- merge(DAGs.COG.CAT.counts, DAGs.COG.CAT.prop, by = "COG20_CATEGORY")
DAGs.COG.CAT.prop <- DAGs.COG.CAT.prop %>%
  arrange(comp)

DAGs.COG.CAT.prop$rel.abund <- DAGs.COG.CAT.prop$COG.counts/DAGs.COG.CAT.prop$total_CAT.count

# Calculate normalizing factor to apply to COG counts relatives abundances
comp.counts <- DAGs.COG.CAT.prop %>%
  group_by(comp) %>%
  summarise(comp.count = sum(COG.counts))
DAGs.COG.CAT.prop <- merge(DAGs.COG.CAT.prop, comp.counts, by = "comp")
DAGs.COG.CAT.prop <- DAGs.COG.CAT.prop %>%
  arrange(comp)
DAGs.COG.CAT.prop$norm.fact <- DAGs.COG.CAT.prop$comp.count/sum(comp.counts$comp.count)

# apply normalization
DAGs.COG.CAT.prop$norm.abund <- DAGs.COG.CAT.prop$rel.abund/DAGs.COG.CAT.prop$norm.fact



# archives - DO NOT RUN
# Calculate normalizing factor to apply to COG counts relatives abundances
comp.counts <- as.data.frame(apply(DAGs[,c(61:65)] + 2, 1, function(x) {
  paste(x, collapse = "")
}))
levels.temp <- levels(factor(comp.counts$comp, levels = unique(comp.counts$comp)))
comp.counts <- as.data.frame(table(comp.counts$comp))
colnames(comp.counts) <- c("comp","comp.count")
comp.counts$comp <- factor(x = comp.counts$comp, levels = levels.temp)
comp.counts <- comp.counts %>%
  arrange(comp)
DAGs.COG.CAT.prop$test <- DAGs.COG.CAT.prop$rel.abund/DAGs.COG.CAT.prop$norm.fact
rm(levels.temp)

sum(DAGs.COG.CAT.prop[DAGs.COG.CAT.prop$COG20_CATEGORY == "Amino acid transport and metabolism",]$norm.abund)
```

DAGs NON rarefied and NON filtered data

```{r}
countData <- as.data.frame(t(data.cov.c.agg.comm))
sum(rowSums(countData)==0)
colSums(countData)
```

Make sure count dataframe's columns and metadata's rows are in the same order
```{r}
all(rownames(metadata) == colnames(countData))
```

Analysis
```{r}
GC.dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = countData,
                              colData = metadata, 
                              design = ~ host_species)
# Make COCO reference level
GC.dds$host_species <- relevel(GC.dds$host_species, ref = "COCO")

GC.dds <- DESeq(GC.dds, fitType = 'local')

resultsNames(GC.dds) # lists the coefficients
```

```{r}
GC.res.ABBA.ACSA <- results(GC.dds, contrast=c("host_species","ABBA","ACSA"), alpha = 0.05)
GC.res.ABBA.COCO <- results(GC.dds, contrast=c("host_species","ABBA","COCO"), alpha = 0.05)
GC.res.ABBA.FAGR <- results(GC.dds, contrast=c("host_species","ABBA","FAGR"), alpha = 0.05)
GC.res.ABBA.THOC <- results(GC.dds, contrast=c("host_species","ABBA","THOC"), alpha = 0.05)
GC.res.ACSA.COCO <- results(GC.dds, contrast=c("host_species","ACSA","COCO"), alpha = 0.05)
GC.res.ACSA.FAGR <- results(GC.dds, contrast=c("host_species","ACSA","FAGR"), alpha = 0.05)
GC.res.ACSA.THOC <- results(GC.dds, contrast=c("host_species","ACSA","THOC"), alpha = 0.05)
GC.res.COCO.FAGR <- results(GC.dds, contrast=c("host_species","COCO","FAGR"), alpha = 0.05)
GC.res.COCO.THOC <- results(GC.dds, contrast=c("host_species","COCO","THOC"), alpha = 0.05)
GC.res.FAGR.THOC <- results(GC.dds, contrast=c("host_species","FAGR","THOC"), alpha = 0.05)
```

Analyzing results
```{r}
# GC with signicant differential abundances between host tree species (adjusted_p_value<0.05)
GC.sig.ABBA.ACSA <- GC.res.ABBA.ACSA[is.na(GC.res.ABBA.ACSA$padj)==F&GC.res.ABBA.ACSA$padj<0.05,]
GC.sig.ABBA.COCO <- GC.res.ABBA.COCO[is.na(GC.res.ABBA.COCO$padj)==F&GC.res.ABBA.COCO$padj<0.05,]
GC.sig.ABBA.FAGR <- GC.res.ABBA.FAGR[is.na(GC.res.ABBA.FAGR$padj)==F&GC.res.ABBA.FAGR$padj<0.05,]
GC.sig.ABBA.THOC <- GC.res.ABBA.THOC[is.na(GC.res.ABBA.THOC$padj)==F&GC.res.ABBA.THOC$padj<0.05,] 
GC.sig.ACSA.COCO <- GC.res.ACSA.COCO[is.na(GC.res.ACSA.COCO$padj)==F&GC.res.ACSA.COCO$padj<0.05,]
GC.sig.ACSA.FAGR <- GC.res.ACSA.FAGR[is.na(GC.res.ACSA.FAGR$padj)==F&GC.res.ACSA.FAGR$padj<0.05,]
GC.sig.ACSA.THOC <- GC.res.ACSA.THOC[is.na(GC.res.ACSA.THOC$padj)==F&GC.res.ACSA.THOC$padj<0.05,] 
GC.sig.COCO.FAGR <- GC.res.COCO.FAGR[is.na(GC.res.COCO.FAGR$padj)==F&GC.res.COCO.FAGR$padj<0.05,] 
GC.sig.COCO.THOC <- GC.res.COCO.THOC[is.na(GC.res.COCO.THOC$padj)==F&GC.res.COCO.THOC$padj<0.05,] 
GC.sig.FAGR.THOC <- GC.res.FAGR.THOC[is.na(GC.res.FAGR.THOC$padj)==F&GC.res.FAGR.THOC$padj<0.05,] 
```
